prerequisites: A Nylas account with access to the Nylas Dashboard (dashboard-v3.nylas.com).
A Nylas application created in the Dashboard. New accounts on the Free tier can create a Sandbox application; choose the application's data residency region (US or EU) when creating it.
An API key generated for that application. The Dashboard shows the key secret only once, so copy and store it securely.
The regional API server base URL that matches your application's data residency (US or EU).
A start date and end date defining the time window of data to replicate.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the application's Nylas API key, supplied via the connector's api_key secret field. Nylas sends it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header to authorize server-side requests.

setupSteps.title: Create a Nylas application
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Nylas Dashboard, open the application menu, and select Create new application. Enter a name and description, choose the data residency region, select an environment, and click Create application. Free-tier accounts can create a Sandbox application.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: In your application, open the API keys page and create a new key, specifying its name and expiration timeline. The Dashboard displays the key secret only once, so copy it immediately and store it securely. Use this value for the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Set the regional API server
setupSteps.body: Set api_server to the base URL that matches your application's data residency region: https://api.us.nylas.com for US (Iowa) or https://api.eu.nylas.com for Europe (London). The region you chose when creating the application determines which endpoint stores and serves your data.

setupSteps.title: Configure the replication window
setupSteps.body: Set start_date and end_date to bound the time range of data the connector reads from the Nylas API.

sources.title: Using the Nylas Dashboard (create application and API key)
Nylas v3 getting started (API key as Bearer token)
Nylas data residency (regional API server URLs)
